description: Revenue recognition patterns per Nigerian industry, aligned with IFRS 15 Revenue from Contracts with Customers. Each industry lists performance obligations, revenue streams, recognition methods, and typical margins.
author: Quadri Atharu

performance_obligations.name: Delivery of crude oil at designated terminal
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery and title transfer at export terminal

performance_obligations.name: Delivery of natural gas per GSA
performance_obligations.standalone_selling_price_method: Contract price per MMBtu (indexed to oil basket)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as gas is delivered and measured at metering station

performance_obligations.name: Gas processing services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as processing services are rendered per throughput

performance_obligations.name: Pipeline transportation (tariff)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as gas/oil transported through pipeline system

revenue_streams.name: Crude oil sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - delivery at terminal (FOB/ CIF)

revenue_streams.name: Natural gas sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - measured delivery per GSA

revenue_streams.name: Condensate and NGL sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - delivery at terminal

revenue_streams.name: Gas processing and tariff
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - service rendered

revenue_streams.name: Other operating income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Delivery of manufactured goods per sales contract
performance_obligations.standalone_selling_price_method: Standalone selling price per product catalogue
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery and customer acceptance

performance_obligations.name: Warranty coverage (assurance type)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Not separate PO - assurance warranty

performance_obligations.name: Installation and commissioning
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon completion and sign-off

revenue_streams.name: Domestic product sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery/acceptance

revenue_streams.name: Export product sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - per Incoterms (FOB/CIF)

revenue_streams.name: By-product and scrap sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery

revenue_streams.name: Warranty service revenue (if service-type)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - warranty period

revenue_streams.name: Other operating income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Provision of loan facility
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - interest accrued using EIR method per IFRS 9

performance_obligations.name: Deposit taking and custodial services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as service is provided

performance_obligations.name: Fee-based services (LC, guarantee, transfer)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon service completion

performance_obligations.name: Advisory and arrangement services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time or point in time - per contract terms

revenue_streams.name: Interest income - loans and advances
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - EIR under IFRS 9 (not IFRS 15)

revenue_streams.name: Interest income - investment securities
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - EIR under IFRS 9

revenue_streams.name: Fee and commission income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - service rendered

revenue_streams.name: Trading income (FX, derivatives)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Fair value changes - FVTPL under IFRS 9

revenue_streams.name: Other operating income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Provision of insurance coverage (general)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - coverage period per IFRS 17 PAA or GMM

performance_obligations.name: Provision of life insurance coverage
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - coverage period per IFRS 17 VFA

performance_obligations.name: Claims handling service
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as claims are assessed and settled

revenue_streams.name: Gross premium income (net of reinsurance)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - IFRS 17 insurance service revenue (PAA/GMM)

revenue_streams.name: Investment income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - interest and dividends per IFRS 9

revenue_streams.name: Reinsurance commission
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - coverage period

revenue_streams.name: Fee and commission income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - service rendered

revenue_streams.name: Gains on investment property
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Fair value changes under IAS 40

performance_obligations.name: Sale of merchandise to customer
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - at checkout/POS or upon delivery for online

performance_obligations.name: Loyalty programme benefits
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - deferred and recognised upon redemption

performance_obligations.name: Gift card/voucher fulfilment
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon redemption by customer

revenue_streams.name: In-store sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - at POS checkout

revenue_streams.name: Online/e-commerce sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery to customer

revenue_streams.name: Wholesale/bulk sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery

revenue_streams.name: Loyalty programme breakage
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - based on expected breakage rate

revenue_streams.name: Other income (vendor rebates)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned - upon meeting volume targets

performance_obligations.name: Provision of voice and data services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as service is consumed by subscriber

performance_obligations.name: Sale of devices and SIM cards
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery to subscriber

performance_obligations.name: VAS and digital services
performance_obligations.standalone_selling_price_method: Expected cost plus margin / adjusted market
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as service is consumed

performance_obligations.name: Enterprise connectivity solutions
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - service period per SLA

revenue_streams.name: Voice revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as calls are made (prepaid/postpaid)

revenue_streams.name: Data revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as data is consumed per bundle

revenue_streams.name: VAS and digital services
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as services are consumed

revenue_streams.name: Interconnect revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - measured per interconnect traffic

revenue_streams.name: Device and handset sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon sale

revenue_streams.name: Enterprise solutions
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - service period per contract

performance_obligations.name: Delivery of harvested produce
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery to buyer or off-taker

performance_obligations.name: Sale of livestock and poultry
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery

performance_obligations.name: Biological asset transformation (bearer plants)
performance_obligations.standalone_selling_price_method: Fair value less cost to sell (IAS 41)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - change in fair value of biological assets

revenue_streams.name: Crop sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon harvest and delivery

revenue_streams.name: Livestock and poultry sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery/slaughter

revenue_streams.name: Dairy and fishery sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery

revenue_streams.name: Change in fair value of biological assets
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - fair value change per IAS 41

revenue_streams.name: Government grants (CBN Anchor/ATA)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as conditions met per IAS 20

revenue_streams.name: Other agricultural income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Construction of asset per contract
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - progress towards completion (cost-to-cost or output method)

performance_obligations.name: Variation orders and change orders
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as variation work is performed

performance_obligations.name: Claims and performance bonuses
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon settlement/achievement

revenue_streams.name: Contract revenue (main works)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - cost-to-cost method per IFRS 15

revenue_streams.name: Variation order revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as work performed (approved VO)

revenue_streams.name: Claims revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon settlement/agreement

revenue_streams.name: Performance bonus
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon milestone achievement

revenue_streams.name: Equipment rental income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - rental period

revenue_streams.name: Other income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Freight and haulage transportation
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as transportation service is rendered

performance_obligations.name: Warehousing and storage services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - storage period

performance_obligations.name: Last-mile delivery
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery confirmation

performance_obligations.name: Clearing and forwarding
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon clearance completion

revenue_streams.name: Freight and haulage
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as transportation service is provided

revenue_streams.name: Warehousing revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - monthly storage period

revenue_streams.name: Last-mile delivery
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon successful delivery

revenue_streams.name: Clearing and forwarding
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon completion of clearing

revenue_streams.name: Packaging and value-added services
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon service completion

revenue_streams.name: Other logistics income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Medical consultation and treatment
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon completion of consultation/treatment

performance_obligations.name: Surgical procedures
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon completion of procedure

performance_obligations.name: Laboratory and diagnostic services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon issuance of test results

performance_obligations.name: Inpatient care (ward and accommodation)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - per day of admission

revenue_streams.name: Consultation and procedure fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon service completion

revenue_streams.name: Laboratory and diagnostic revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon result issuance

revenue_streams.name: Pharmacy dispensing revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon dispensing

revenue_streams.name: Ward and accommodation revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - per day of admission

revenue_streams.name: HMO capitation revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - per enrolled lives per period

revenue_streams.name: NHIS and other income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned / as services rendered

performance_obligations.name: Provision of academic instruction (term/semester)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as instruction is delivered over academic term

performance_obligations.name: Boarding and hostel services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - over boarding period

performance_obligations.name: Examination and certification services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon examination completion and certification

revenue_streams.name: Tuition and school fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as academic services delivered per term

revenue_streams.name: Boarding and hostel fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - over boarding period

revenue_streams.name: Examination fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon examination administration

revenue_streams.name: Laboratory and workshop fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as services are provided

revenue_streams.name: TETFund and government grants
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as conditions met per IAS 20

revenue_streams.name: Auxiliary (canteen, bookshop, events)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon sale/service

performance_obligations.name: Tax assessment and collection (non-exchange)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon assessment/meeting recognition criteria

performance_obligations.name: Statutory allocation (non-exchange)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon receipt/entitlement

performance_obligations.name: Fees, licences and permits (exchange)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time or over time - per service rendered

revenue_streams.name: Federation account allocation (FAAC)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - non-exchange (IPSAS 23)

revenue_streams.name: Internally generated revenue (IGR)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon collection/assessment

revenue_streams.name: VAT share
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - non-exchange (IPSAS 23)

revenue_streams.name: Grants and aid (exchange)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as conditions met (IPSAS 23/IAS 20)

revenue_streams.name: Capital receipts and borrowing
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon receipt (capital revenue)

revenue_streams.name: Derivation and other statutory
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - non-exchange

performance_obligations.name: Programme implementation per donor agreement
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as programme activities are delivered

performance_obligations.name: Capacity building and training
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon completion of training event

performance_obligations.name: Research and advocacy services
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as deliverables are produced

revenue_streams.name: Restricted grant income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as conditions met per IAS 20/donor agreement

revenue_streams.name: Unrestricted grant income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon receipt / entitlement

revenue_streams.name: Donation income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon receipt

revenue_streams.name: Programme service fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time or point in time - per service delivery

revenue_streams.name: Investment income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - interest and dividends

revenue_streams.name: Other income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: SaaS subscription (access to software)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - ratably over subscription period

performance_obligations.name: Software licence (perpetual)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery/activation

performance_obligations.name: Professional services (implementation)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - as services rendered (hours-based or milestone)

performance_obligations.name: Post-implementation support
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - over support period

revenue_streams.name: SaaS subscription revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - ratably over subscription term

revenue_streams.name: Software licence revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery and activation

revenue_streams.name: Professional services
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - as services rendered per contract

revenue_streams.name: Maintenance and support
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time - over support period

revenue_streams.name: API and transaction fees
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - per transaction/usage

revenue_streams.name: Other income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned

performance_obligations.name: Delivery of vehicle per sales contract
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon delivery and customer acceptance

performance_obligations.name: After-sales service and maintenance
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: At a point in time - upon service completion

performance_obligations.name: Vehicle warranty (assurance type)
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Not separate PO - assurance warranty per IFRS 15

performance_obligations.name: CKD/SKD assembly per contract
performance_obligations.recognition_timing: Over time - progress towards completion or point in time per terms

revenue_streams.name: Vehicle sales
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon delivery and acceptance

revenue_streams.name: Spare parts and accessories
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon sale/delivery

revenue_streams.name: After-sales service revenue
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon service completion

revenue_streams.name: Vehicle assembly (CKD/SKD)
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Over time or point in time - per contract

revenue_streams.name: Insurance and registration commission
revenue_streams.recognition_method: Point in time - upon referral/sale

revenue_streams.name: Other income
revenue_streams.recognition_method: As earned
